original_abstract: In this study the contribution of the technological devices on students’ success has been examined. The effects of the ownership of cell phones, the connection to internet from cell phones , the ownership of computers and the connection to internet from their computers and the numbers of TVs at home on the attendance exam which represents the success of the students have been investigated with parametric tests in the province of Denizli. As a result the students who have computers and have connection to internet at home have been found more successful.
humanized_abstract: In this study, an attempt has been made to determine the contribution of the technological devices on the students’ achievement levels. When the impact of cell phones possessed by students, cell phones with internet accessibility, computers possessed, computers with internet accessibility and the number of TVs at home on students’ achievement levels in attendance exam which is known as a criterion for students’ success have been examined with parametric test methods in the province of Denizli, it has been seen that the students possessing computers and having access to the internet from their homes have achieved higher levels.
